title: Specklinia pertenuis
taxonomy: Specklinia pertenuis is a species within the orchid family, specifically classified under the subfamily Epidendroideae. It belongs to the genus Specklinia, which is a group of small, delicate orchids native to Central and South America. The species is further classified as part of the tribe Maxillarieae, a large and diverse group of orchids. Specklinia pertenuis is also known to be a part of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, a subtribe characterized by small flowers and unique growth habits. The classification of Specklinia pertenuis is subject to ongoing research and updates in the field of orchid taxonomy.
